data.title: Edwin, Global Head of OTC at Gate.io, hosted a roundtable discussion at the Hong Kong Web3 Carnival to discuss PayFi innovation and regulatory development
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Edwin Cheung, Global Head of Gate.io OTC, appeared at the Hong Kong Web3 Carnival and hosted a roundtable forum to discuss the latest developments and future developments in the field of digital payments. As the world's leading digital asset trading platform, Gate.io focuses on the development of a diversified blockchain ecosystem and is committed to improving user experience and continuously optimizing technology. In recent years, it has provided feasible solutions for application scenarios such as cross-border settlement and bulk transactions, demonstrating its professional strength in the field of digital payments.

data.title: Crypto Lawyer Sues US Authorities for Uncovering Satoshi Nakamoto
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Well-known crypto lawyer James Murphy (@MetaLawMan) has filed a lawsuit against the U.S. Department of Homeland Security (DHS) under the Freedom of Information Act (FOIA). A lawsuit has been filed against the U.S. Department of Homeland Security (DHS) under the Freedom of Information Act (FOIA). The legal action filed on April 7 aims to reveal the identity information of the mysterious founder of Bitcoin, Satoshi Nakamoto, that the U.S. government may have. Murphy said the lawsuit was caused by a speech at a financial intelligence conference in 2019. At the meeting, a DHS official claimed that he had identified Satoshi Nakamoto and interviewed him in California, where three other Bitcoin developers were present. Murphy now wants to obtain relevant internal documents, emails and notes from the Department of Homeland Security to verify whether the interview was true. He believes that if the interview really took place, there must be a written record, and this lawsuit is intended to make these records public. At the same time, Murphy called on Christy Noem, Secretary of the Department of Homeland Security, to voluntarily disclose information. If the Department of Homeland Security refuses, he said he will insist on the lawsuit until the truth comes out.

data.title: Metis founder Elena published an open letter to the community, elaborating on the strategy of aligning AI governance with human values
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News: Elena Sinelnikova, co-founder of Ethereum Layer2 Metis, wrote to all community members through Metis official X, systematically analyzing the governance structure, one of the core values ​​of Metis, and the strategic development direction and future practical scenarios of its AI governance framework and alignment with human values.
Metis is committed to achieving decentralization across multiple levels and has unique advantages in achieving effective balance and coordination between artificial intelligence and humans: the upcoming Metis SDK can achieve seamless interoperability with all other chains; through verifiable computing technology, individual centralized DAO (iDAO) for asset management, and data anchored tokens (DAT) that support the anchoring of AI assets throughout their life cycle, LazAI has built a set of technical frameworks to systematically solve the AI ​​alignment problem. Its core goal, the AI ​​alignment problem, is the key to ensuring that future AI governance is aligned with human needs and visions.
Metis' vision of "effective and balanced coordination between artificial intelligence and humans" will have the potential to solve a wide range of problems, such as large-scale problems such as solving global political inefficiency and inconsistency with the people, inefficient national and corporate governance, unstable economic policies, economic collapse and crisis, etc., and can also provide decision-making advice and guidance on each smaller but more influential problem, such as giving business decisions, assisting DAO members to understand voting governance and assisting members to participate effectively.
Metis' future development vision will be as its co-founder Elena mentioned in an open letter: "Based on Metis's solid decentralized foundation, cross-chain interoperability advantages and commitment to ethical AI governance systems, Metis is by no means an ordinary Web3 platform - it is becoming an ideal testing ground for reshaping governance models, business ecosystems and social structures, and creating a better paradigm through a decentralized AI-human collaboration model."

data.title: Ethereum falls below the “realized price”, and the historical backtest may enter the strategic accumulation range for long-term investors
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Cryptoquant analyst theKriptolik published an analysis pointing out that Ethereum has fallen below its "realized price" of around $2,300. The "realized price" is the price of each Ethereum when it is last transferred through the blockchain. It is one of the indicators for recalculating the market value of cryptocurrencies. The average of all transaction prices is the realized price. Compared with the current market price, it can more truly reflect the average holding cost of investors. This indicator usually forms a key support or resistance level. When ETH falls below the realized price, it means that most holders are in a floating loss state. In periods of market panic (such as now), it is very easy to trigger a "cut-meat" sell-off. If a large-scale sell-off occurs, it marks the beginning of the "surrender stage" and a collective collapse of investor confidence. Historical data shows that falling below the realized price usually occurs at the end of a major downward trend. On-chain data shows that when the ETH price falls below the realized price, there is an 80% probability of appearing in the long-term bottom area, and the average rebound in the next 6 months is 217%. At the same time, falling below the realized price has also been proven by history to be a strategic accumulation range for long-term investors. In the short term, Ethereum's fall below the realized price reflects that the market is in panic, but from the perspective of historical cycles, the current price may be building a rare golden opportunity.

data.title: Bitcoin News: Addresses In Profit Reach Lowest Level In 3 Months, What’s Next?
data.description:
The number of Bitcoin (BTC) addresses in profit continues to decline, reaching lows last seen in February 2025. As Bitcoin news cycle sees no new respite, BTC price action flashed short-term greens. The price of Bitcoin is down over 28% from its all-time high of $109,079, set in January this year
source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2025/04/08/bitcoin-news-addresses-in-profit-falls-to-lowest-level-in-3-months-what-next/

data.title: Hedera and DFINITY Join Forces to Power On-Chain AI
data.description:
A newly formed technical group is exploring ways to supercharge the Hedera network. They aim to combine Hedera’s speed and security with DFINITY’s cutting-edge Internet Computer Protocol (ICP) technology. The goal? To take on three major challenges that are key to the future of blockchain, Web3, and AI on-chain—and tackle them head-on. 1
